seoTitle: How to Create Bookmarks in Power BI (Reports 101)
metaDescription: Learn the basics of creating bookmarks in Power BI to build interactive reports that let viewers jump straight to key insights.
intro: Bookmarks are one of the core building blocks for interactivity in Power BI, letting you save a specific report state and return to it with a single click. This beginner-focused guide covers setting up views, saving bookmarks, and using them to guide viewers through your data story. It's a foundational skill for anyone building reports meant to be presented, not just read.

steps.heading: Set up your initial views
steps.body: Arrange your report's filters, visuals, or page state exactly how you want it to look before saving it as a bookmark.

steps.heading: Save bookmarks
steps.body: Capture the current state of your report as a bookmark so you can return to it later or link it to a button.

steps.heading: Utilize bookmarks in presentations
steps.body: Use saved bookmarks to jump directly to key insights during a live presentation instead of manually adjusting filters in front of an audience.

steps.heading: Automate your reporting process using bookmarks
steps.body: Combine bookmarks with buttons to create guided, self-service navigation that viewers can use on their own.

steps.heading: Enhance storytelling with data
steps.body: Sequence multiple bookmarks together to walk viewers through a narrative, highlighting different insights in a logical order.

faq.question: What exactly does a Power BI bookmark save?
faq.answer: A bookmark can capture the report's filter state, visual selections, and even which visuals are visible, depending on how you configure it.

faq.question: Do I need a button to use a bookmark?
faq.answer: No, bookmarks can be accessed directly from the Bookmarks pane, though pairing them with buttons makes navigation easier for report viewers.

faq.question: Can bookmarks help during live presentations to stakeholders?
faq.answer: Yes, bookmarks let you jump straight to key views during a presentation instead of manually recreating a specific filtered state.

faq.question: Is there a limit to how many bookmarks I can create?
faq.answer: Power BI doesn't impose a strict limit, though keeping the number manageable makes them easier to organize and use effectively.

faq.question: Do bookmarks work the same way once a report is published?
faq.answer: Yes, bookmarks function the same for viewers of a published report as they do while building it in Power BI Desktop.
